summary: Implemented body measurement recording page with latest data card, entry form, trend chart, history list, metric selector, and empty state. All components follow the injected-props pattern for testability.
keyDecisions: Used injected-props pattern for BodyDataScreen (same as HistoryScreen) to maximize testability
TrendChart uses View-based dot rendering instead of native chart library for testability
BodyEntryForm handles both create and edit modes via optional editingMeasurement prop
Weight change computed as latest minus previous with green-down/red-up convention
Circumference fields are optional (nullable) - only non-null values saved
Validation rejects future dates, zero/negative weight, and abnormal weight values (>500kg)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Latest data card at top: most recent weight + change trend arrow (green down / red up) + date
"+ 记录数据" button opens entry form (push page)
Entry form: date picker (default today), weight (required), chest/waist/arm/thigh circumference (optional), note
Segment selector: 趋势图 / 历史记录
Trend chart: line chart of selected metric over time
History list: records sorted by date descending with edit/delete on swipe
Edit pre-fills form with existing data
Empty state: "记录你的第一次身体数据" prompt
Nullable circumference fields: only save non-null values

notes: 41 new tests for body data page helpers and component exports. Total suite 920 tests all passing.
